problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
